title: Entity Domain Metadata
description: Centralized metadata for Home Assistant entity domains used across the espcompose monorepo.

domains.description: Map of domain name to its descriptor.

sensorPlatform.description: ESPHome sensor platform type this domain maps to for codegen.

cppType.description: C++ signal type for esphome-target codegen (e.g. 'bool', 'float', 'std::string').

defaultState.description: Default state string for simulator mock (e.g. 'off', '0', 'closed').

activeState.description: State string that means 'active' (e.g. 'on', 'open'). Null for sensors/read-only entities.

uiCategory.description: UI category for the simulator entity panel.

properties.description: Reactive properties exposed by the binding interface.

actions.description: Actions the user can call (empty for read-only entities).

triggers.description: ESPHome trigger signatures. Keys are snake_case trigger names (e.g. 'on_state').

name.description: camelCase property name matching the binding interface (e.g. 'isOn', 'brightness').

cppPath.description: C++ access path on the component (e.g. '.state', '.current_values.get_brightness()').

sourceDomain.description: Domain used for trigger registry lookup. Usually the sensorPlatform, but for properties like brightness or isOpen it is the entity domain itself (e.g. 'light', 'cover').

name.description: camelCase method name from the binding interface (e.g. 'turnOn', 'open').

resultState.description: State the entity transitions to after this action (for mock provider). Null for toggle-like actions.

variables.description: Variables available inside the trigger's lambda scope. Empty array means no variables.

name.description: Variable name available in the trigger lambda (e.g. 'x').
